title: The Infinite Descent
lines: You climb to the top of the wooden log flume. Below, the track is covered in a thick, black ichor that seems to be moving of its own accord.
Your flashlight flickers and dies for several seconds. In the darkness, you hear a chanting that isn't human. It's coming from the bottom of the ride.
You feel a strange, hollow sensation in your chest, as if your own heart is being replaced by something cold and rhythmic.

options.desc: 1. Slide down into the chanting dark
2. Jump into the green sludge pool below
3. Scramble back down the rickety stairs
